cities.name: Bali
cities.notes: Ubud rice terraces, Tanah Lot sunset temple and surf at Uluwatu

cities.name: Yogyakarta
cities.notes: Borobudur at sunrise, Prambanan temple complex and batik workshops

cities.name: Jakarta
cities.notes: National Museum, Kota Tua Dutch colonial quarter and diverse food scene

cities.name: Lombok
cities.notes: Gili Islands snorkeling, Rinjani volcano trek and quieter beaches

cities.name: Komodo
cities.notes: Komodo dragon encounters, Pink Beach and world-class diving

cities.name: Raja Ampat
cities.notes: Earth's most biodiverse marine ecosystem with 1500+ fish species
